snippet.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Sreeleela | Raashii Khanna
snippet.description:
Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer on @MythriMovieMakers 

Ustaad Bhagat Singh is an Upcoming 2026 Telugu movie ft. Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna & others. Music composed by Rockstar Devi Sri Prasad, Written and Directed by Harish Shankar.S. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

In Cinemas March 19th, 2026.

#UstaadBhagatSinghTrailer #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #HarishShankar #Sreeleela #RaashiiKhanna #DeviSriPrasad #DSP #NaveenYerneni #RaviShankar #MythriMovieMakers

Cast & Crew Details :

Cast: Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna, Parthiban & Others

Technical Crew:
Written & Directed by: Harish Shankar.S
Producers: Naveen Yerneni, Ravi Shankar Yalamanchili
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Background Score: Thaman S
Screenplay: K Dasharath, Ramesh Reddy
Additional writing: Praveen Varma and Chandramohan.
Editing: Karthika Srinivas 
Production Designer: Anand Sai 
CEO: Cherry

Creative Producer: Harish Pai 
Fights : Ram Laxman, Nabakanth, Prudhvi

DI & Sound Mix: Annapurna Studios
Mix Engineer: Kannan Ganpat
Colorist: Venu Gopal Rao J
Marketing: First show

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SURVIVAL STAGE | Day 1 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SURVIVAL STAGE begins.

After the Semi Finals, the bottom 16 teams get one final opportunity to fight their way back into contention. There are no easy games now. Every match carries everything.

Only the Top 8 teams from the Survival Stage will secure their place in the GRAND FINALS.

One more chance. One more run. No room for mistakes.

Watch the Survival Stage live and see who keeps their championship hopes alive.

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kraftonindiaesports/
Follow us on X: https://x.com/KIEOFFICIAL_
Join our official Discord server: https://discord.gg/P53etCn5ve

#BGIS2026 #BreakingBoundaries #BGMILIVE #KraftonIndiaEsports #BGMI

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Teaser | Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 10 Apr
snippet.description:
Laughter, screams, and surprises are waiting inside the Bangla. Dare to enter? рЯ§£рЯІЯвАНвЩАпЄП
#BhoothBanglaTeaser out now!

#BhoothBangla in cinemas on 10th April 2026 рЯСї

Bhooth Bangla reunites #AkshayKumar with acclaimed director #Priyadarshan after 14 years, promising a delightful blend of comedy, horror, and thrill.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Farahjaan Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali

snippet.title: MAATRUBHUMI - Official Trailer | Salman Khan | Chitrangada Singh | Apoorva Lakhia | Battle Of Galwan
snippet.description:
#salmankhan #maatrubhumi #trailer #teaser 
unreal movies presenting fan-made trailer and news update of MAATRUBHUMI - Official Trailer | Salman Khan | Chitrangada Singh | Apoorva Lakhia | 17th April 2026
Disclaimer: This is a fan-made trailer and not an official film release.
IN THIS VIDEO:-
maatrubhumi movie salman khan, salman khan new movie name maatrubhumi, salman khan maatru bhumi movie, maatrubhumi salman khan, salman khan maatrubhumi, maatrubhumi salman khan film, maatrubhumi song salman khan battle of galwan, salman khan galwan movie, salman khan movie, battle of galwan movie salman khan, salman khan movie battle of galwan, battle of galwan salman khan movie trailer, salman khan movie trailer, salman khan movie song, salman khan galwan movie renamed, salman khan movies

вЬґ Under Section 107 of the Copyright Act 1976,a allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship and research, Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing. non-profit educational or personal use tips the balance in favor of fair use.

вЬґ In this Concept trailer video I'm displaying visual commentary on how a film idea could look, The purpose of This Mashup / Fan-made / Concept trailer videos is to demonstrate and conceptualize specific or non-existing film ideas, compile and transform clips from previously existing productions to create a creatively unique vision and giving new meaning. I've transformed the original work by adding My own unique value such as added high-quality edits and special effects to create completely new, original movie trailers. These are derivative works as defined by the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. ¬І 101, and as such, may find protection from copyright claims under the doctrine of fair use.

вЬґ In this channel I'm creating Mashup / Fan-made / Concept trailer videos, involve collecting multiple pieces of film footage from one or multiple movies and editing them to create a new trailer. Trailer mashups are often created for a movie that does not exist now or to change the genre of an existing film. These are derivative works and as such, may find protection from copyright claims under the doctrine of fair use. snippet.title: BTS: THE RETURN | Documentary | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
BTS: THE RETURN, a Netflix Documentary. Follow the long-awaited comeback of pop royalty, BTS. Get unprecedented access to the seven membersвАЩ journey of doubt, laughter, and rediscovery as they return to the studio, create new music, and begin the comeback of the decade! From acclaimed director Bao Nguyen (The Stringer, The Greatest Night in Pop) and producers This Machine (Martha, Karol G) and HYBE.

BTS: The Return - Only on Netflix, March 27

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82158609

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the worldвАЩs leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

BTS: THE RETURN | Documentary | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

They're back! BTS gathers in LA to record their album "Arirang" in this documentary offering unprecedented access to the band as they enter a new era.

snippet.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailer Reaction! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Brandon and Michael check out the adrenaline-pumping trailer of Dhurandhar: The Revenge, the next chapter in the high-octane spy-action franchise helmed by Aditya Dhar. Packed with gritty visuals and relentless pacing, the trailer hints at a darker, more personal mission fueled by revenge, layered with political tension and cross-border conflict. From explosive set pieces to intense face-offs, this sequel looks ready to raise the stakes and deliver a hard-hitting cinematic experience. 

The film features a powerhouse cast led by Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), alongside Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #TrailerReaction #BollywoodReaction #SanjayDutt #SpyThriller #IndianCinema

nl-NL.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailerreactie! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
nl-NL.description:
Brandon en Michael bekijken de adrenalineverhogende trailer van Dhurandhar: The Revenge, het volgende hoofdstuk in de enerverende spionage-actiefilmreeks onder leiding van Aditya Dhar. De trailer zit vol rauwe beelden en een razend tempo, en hint naar een duistere, meer persoonlijke missie gedreven door wraak, vermengd met politieke spanning en grensoverschrijdende conflicten. Van explosieve actiesc√®nes tot intense confrontaties, deze sequel lijkt klaar om de lat hoger te leggen en een keiharde filmervaring te leveren.

De film heeft een ijzersterke cast onder leiding van Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), samen met Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border) en Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam). Zij brengen allemaal intensiteit en diepgang in deze rauwe spionagethriller. De trailer belooft spectaculaire actie, emotionele spanning en een verhaal vol wraak en patriottisme.

Brandon and Michael check out the adrenaline-pumping trailer of Dhurandhar: The Revenge, the next chapter in the high-octane spy-action franchise helmed by Aditya Dhar. Packed with gritty visuals and relentless pacing, the trailer hints at a darker, more personal mission fueled by revenge, layered with political tension and cross-border conflict. From explosive set pieces to intense face-offs, this sequel looks ready to raise the stakes and deliver a hard-hitting cinematic experience.

Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

–С—А—Н–љ–і–Њ–љ –Є –Ь–∞–є–Ї–ї –њ–Њ—Б–Љ–Њ—В—А–µ–ї–Є –Ј–∞—Е–≤–∞—В—Л–≤–∞—О—Й–Є–є —В—А–µ–є–ї–µ—А —Д–Є–ї—М–Љ–∞ ¬Ђ–Ф—Е—Г—А–∞–љ–і—Е–∞—А: –Ь–µ—Б—В—М¬ї, —Б–ї–µ–і—Г—О—Й–µ–є —З–∞—Б—В–Є –Њ—Б—В—А–Њ—Б—О–ґ–µ—В–љ–Њ–є —И–њ–Є–Њ–љ—Б–Ї–Њ–є —Н–Ї—И–љ-—Д—А–∞–љ—И–Є–Ј—Л –Њ—В –Р–і–Є—В—М–Є –Ф—Е–∞—А–∞. –Ґ—А–µ–є–ї–µ—А, –љ–∞–њ–Њ–ї–љ–µ–љ–љ—Л–є –ґ–µ—Б—В–Ї–Є–Љ–Є –≤–Є–Ј—Г–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–Љ–Є —Н—Д—Д–µ–Ї—В–∞–Љ–Є –Є –љ–µ—Г–Љ–Њ–ї–Є–Љ—Л–Љ —В–µ–Љ–њ–Њ–Љ, –љ–∞–Љ–µ–Ї–∞–µ—В –љ–∞ –±–Њ–ї–µ–µ –Љ—А–∞—З–љ—Г—О, –ї–Є—З–љ—Г—О –Љ–Є—Б—Б–Є—О, –і–≤–Є–ґ–Є–Љ—Г—О –Љ–µ—Б—В—М—О, —Б –њ–Њ–ї–Є—В–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Њ–є –љ–∞–њ—А—П–ґ–µ–љ–љ–Њ—Б—В—М—О –Є —В—А–∞–љ—Б–≥—А–∞–љ–Є—З–љ—Л–Љ–Є –Ї–Њ–љ—Д–ї–Є–Ї—В–∞–Љ–Є. –Ю—В –≤–Ј—А—Л–≤–љ—Л—Е —Б—Ж–µ–љ –і–Њ –љ–∞–њ—А—П–ґ–µ–љ–љ—Л—Е –њ—А–Њ—В–Є–≤–Њ—Б—В–Њ—П–љ–Є–є, —Н—В–Њ—В —Б–Є–Ї–≤–µ–ї, –њ–Њ—Е–Њ–ґ–µ, –≥–Њ—В–Њ–≤ –њ–Њ–і–љ—П—В—М —Б—В–∞–≤–Ї–Є –Є –њ–Њ–і–∞—А–Є—В—М –Ј—А–Є—В–µ–ї—П–Љ –Ј–∞—Е–≤–∞—В—Л–≤–∞—О—Й–Є–є –Ї–Є–љ–µ–Љ–∞—В–Њ–≥—А–∞—Д–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є –Њ–њ—Л—В.


–Т —Д–Є–ї—М–Љ–µ –Ј–∞–і–µ–є—Б—В–≤–Њ–≤–∞–љ –Ј–≤–µ–Ј–і–љ—Л–є —Б–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤ –∞–Ї—В–µ—А–Њ–≤ –≤–Њ –≥–ї–∞–≤–µ —Б –†–∞–љ–≤–Є—А–Њ–Љ –°–Є–љ–≥—Е–Њ–Љ (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), –∞ —В–∞–Ї–ґ–µ –°–∞–љ–і–ґ–∞–µ–Љ –Ф–∞—В—В–Њ–Љ (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), –†. –Ь–∞–і—Е–∞–≤–∞–љ–Њ–Љ (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), –Р—А–і–ґ—Г–љ–Њ–Љ –†–∞–Љ–њ–∞–ї–Њ–Љ (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), –Р–Ї—И–∞–µ–Љ –Ъ—Е–∞–љ–љ–Њ–є (Drishyam 2, Border) –Є –°–∞—А–Њ–є –Р—А–і–ґ—Г–љ (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), –Ї–Њ—В–Њ—А—Л–µ –њ—А–Є–≤–љ–Њ—Б—П—В –Є–љ—В–µ–љ—Б–Є–≤–љ–Њ—Б—В—М –Є –≥–ї—Г–±–Є–љ—Г –≤ —Н—В–Њ—В –ґ–µ—Б—В–Ї–Є–є —И–њ–Є–Њ–љ—Б–Ї–Є–є —В—А–Є–ї–ї–µ—А. –Ґ—А–µ–є–ї–µ—А –Њ–±–µ—Й–∞–µ—В –Љ–∞—Б—И—В–∞–±–љ—Л–µ —Н–Ї—И–љ-—Б—Ж–µ–љ—Л, —Н–Љ–Њ—Ж–Є–Њ–љ–∞–ї—М–љ—Г—О –љ–∞–њ—А—П–ґ–µ–љ–љ–Њ—Б—В—М –Є —Б—О–ґ–µ—В, –Њ—Б–љ–Њ–≤–∞–љ–љ—Л–є –љ–∞ –Љ–µ—Б—В–Є –Є –њ–∞—В—А–Є–Њ—В–Є–Ј–Љ–µ.

аі∞аµЇаіµаµАаµЉ аіЄаіњаіВаіЧаµН (аі™аі§аµНаіЃаіЊаіµаі§аµН, аіЧаі≥аµНаі≥аіњ аіђаµЛаіѓаµН, аіђаіЊаіЬаіњаі±аіЊаіµаµБ аіЃаіЄаµНаі§аіЊаі®аіњ), аіЄаіЮаµНаіЬаіѓаµН аі¶аі§аµНаі§аµН (аіХаµЖаіЬаіњаіОаіЂаµН: аіЪаіЊаі™аµНаі±аµНаі±аµЉ 2, аіЃаµБаі®аµНаі®аіЊ аі≠аіЊаіѓаµН аіОаіВ.аіђаіњ.аіђаіњ.аіОаіЄаµН.), аіЖаµЉ. аіЃаіЊаіІаіµаµї (аі±аµЛаіХаµНаіХаіЯаµНаі∞аіњ: аі¶аіњ аі®аіЃаµНаі™аіњ аіЗаіЂаіХаµНаі±аµНаі±аµН, 3 аіЗаі°аіњаіѓаі±аµНаі±аµНаіЄаµН), аіЕаµЉаіЬаµБаµї аі∞аіЊаіВаі™аіЊаµљ (аі±аіЊ.аіµаµЇ, аіУаіВ аіґаіЊаі®аµНаі§аіњ аіУаіВ), аіЕаіХаµНаіЈаіѓаµН аіЦаі®аµНаі® (аі¶аµГаіґаµНаіѓаіВ 2, аіђаµЛаµЉаі°аµЉ), аіЄаіЊаі±аіЊ аіЕаµЉаіЬаµБаµї (аі¶аµИаіµ аі§аіњаі∞аµБаіЃаіХаµЊ, аіґаµИаіµаіВ) аіОаі®аµНаі®аіњаіµаµЉ аі®аіѓаіњаіХаµНаіХаµБаі®аµНаі® аіТаі∞аµБ аі™аіµаµЉаієаµЧаіЄаµН аіЕаі≠аіњаі®аµЗаі§аіЊаіХаµНаіХаі≥аіЊаі£аµН аіИ аіЪаіњаі§аµНаі∞аі§аµНаі§аіњаµљ аіЕаі≠аіњаі®аіѓаіњаіХаµНаіХаµБаі®аµНаі®аі§аµН. аіЗаіµаі∞аµЖаі≤аµНаі≤аіЊаіВ аіИ аіЪаіЊаі∞аіµаµГаі§аµНаі§аіњ аі§аµНаі∞аіњаі≤аµНаі≤аі±аіњаі®аµН аі§аµАаіµаµНаі∞аі§аіѓаµБаіВ аіЖаііаіµаµБаіВ аі®аµљаіХаµБаі®аµНаі®аµБ. аіЬаµАаіµаіњаі§аі§аµНаі§аµЗаіХаµНаіХаіЊаµЊ аіµаі≤аіњаіѓ аіЖаіХаµНаіЈаµї, аіµаµИаіХаіЊаі∞аіњаіХаіЃаіЊаіѓ аі§аµАаі∞аµБаіЃаіЊаі®аіЩаµНаіЩаµЊ, аі™аµНаі∞аі§аіњаіХаіЊаі∞аіµаµБаіВ аі¶аµЗаіґаіЄаµНвАМаі®аµЗаієаіµаµБаіВ аі®аіњаі±аіЮаµНаіЮ аіТаі∞аµБ аіХаі• аіОаі®аµНаі®аіњаіµаіѓаіЊаі£аµН аіЯаµНаі∞аµЖаіѓаіњаі≤аµЉ аіµаіЊаіЧаµНаі¶аіЊаі®аіВ аіЪаµЖаіѓаµНаіѓаµБаі®аµНаі®аі§аµН.

id.title: Reaksi Trailer DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dar
id.description:
Brandon dan Michael menonton trailer menegangkan Dhurandhar: The Revenge, babak selanjutnya dalam franchise aksi mata-mata berkecepatan tinggi yang disutradarai oleh Aditya Dhar. Dipenuhi dengan visual yang keras dan tempo yang tanpa henti, trailer ini mengisyaratkan misi yang lebih gelap dan personal yang didorong oleh balas dendam, dibumbui dengan ketegangan politik dan konflik lintas batas. Dari adegan-adegan eksplosif hingga konfrontasi yang intens, sekuel ini tampak siap untuk meningkatkan taruhan dan memberikan pengalaman sinematik yang dahsyat.

Film ini menampilkan deretan pemain hebat yang dipimpin oleh Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), bersama Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), dan Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), semuanya menghadirkan intensitas dan kedalaman pada film thriller mata-mata yang menegangkan ini. Trailer menjanjikan aksi yang luar biasa, pertaruhan emosional, dan cerita yang dipenuhi dengan balas dendam dan patriotisme.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #ReaksiTrailer #ReaksiBollywood #SanjayDutt #ThrillerMataMata #SinemaIndia

snippet.title: Sekiro: No Defeat | Official Trailer 2 | Crunchyroll
snippet.description:
The time is Sengoku.

Japan is fractured into many independent nations entangled in ceaseless war. At the center lies Ashina, a land of sacred earth and ancient mystery. Two decades after Sword Saint Isshin Ashina reclaimed the region in a brutal coup, a new threat emerges from within: The Interior Ministry. Desperate to protect his homeland, IsshinвАЩs grandson Genichiro turns to forbidden powers. The only hope lies in a kidnapped boy вАФ the Divine Heir вАФ and his silent protector: a loyal shinobi known only as Sekiro.

This is the story of a lord and his retainer вАФ and their quest to restore balance to a nation on the edge.

snippet.title: BTS (л∞©нГДмЖМлЕДлЛ®) 'мХДл¶ђлЮС (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
л≥Є мљШнЕРмЄ†лКФ 1896лЕД 5мЫФ 8мЭЉмЮР The Washington PostмЧР мЛ§л¶∞ нХЬкµ≠ м≤≠лЕД 7мЭЄмЭШ мЭімХЉкЄ∞(вАЬSeven Koreans at Howard")мЩА, мЭілУ§ м§С мЭЉлґАк∞А к∞ЩмЭА нХі 7мЫФ 24мЭЉ лѓЄкµ≠ мЫМмЛ±нДі D.C.мЧРмДЬ нХЬкµ≠ мµЬміИмЭШ мЭМмЫРмЭД лЕємЭМнХЬ кЄ∞л°ЭмЧРмДЬ мШБк∞РмЭД л∞ЫмХД кЄ∞нЪНлРШмЧИмКµлЛИлЛ§. нХЬкµ≠мЧРмДЬ к±ілДИк∞Д м≤≠лЕДлУ§мЭШ мЛ§м†Ь л™©мЖМл¶ђк∞А лЛікЄі мЧ≠мВђм†Б кЄ∞л°Эк≥Љ мµЬміИмЭШ мХДл¶ђлЮС лЕємЭМмЭілЭЉлКФ лђЄнЩФм†Б мЭШлѓЄл•Љ л™®нЛ∞лЄМл°Ь мВЉмХД нШДлМАм†Б мГБмГБл†•мЧР кЄ∞л∞ШнХШмЧђ мЮђкµђмД± л∞П м∞љмЮСлРЬ к≤ГмЬЉл°Ь, мЛ§м†ЬмЩА лЛ§л•Љ мИШ мЮИмЬЉл©∞ мЧ≠мВђм†Б мВђк±імЭілВШ мЭЄлђЉмЧР лМАнХЬ нПЙк∞А¬ЈнХімДЭк≥ЉлКФ лђікіАнХ®мЭД л∞ЭнЮЩлЛИлЛ§.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (вАЬSeven Koreans at HowardвАЭ), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of вАЬArirang.вАЭ This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:

Art Director: L√©a Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: L√©a Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra
2D Effects Artist: Ina Choi

'Arirang' Composer & Piano: Goldbranch
Sound Designer: Jang Mi Ra

      а™Жа™™а™£а™Њ а™ђаЂЗа™®аЂЗ а™ЬаЂБа™¶а™Њ а™™а™Ња™°а™µа™Њ а™Еа™Ца™§а™∞а™Њ а™П а™Ха™∞а™§а™Њ 
F:  а™єаЂЛ а™µа™Ња™§ а™§а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂА а™єа™Ња™ЪаЂА а™єаЂЛа™ѓ а™Па™µаЂА а™¶аЂБа™µа™Њ а™Ха™∞а™§аЂА 
      а™®а™єа™њ а™§аЂЛ а™єа™µаЂЗ а™єаЂБа™В а™∞а™єаЂАа™ґ а™®а™єа™њ а™Жа™Ѓ а™ЬаЂАа™µа™§аЂА 
M: а™єаЂЗ а™Еа™∞аЂЗ а™®а™Њ а™Ха™∞а™ЬаЂЗ а™§аЂБа™В а™µа™ња™Ъа™Ња™∞ а™ЬаЂАа™Ча™∞ а™Ьа™Ња™® а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂА а™ҐаЂЗа™≤а™°аЂА 
      а™∞аЂЗ а™Ѓа™®а™Ња™µаЂЗ а™ЃаЂЛа™∞а™≤аЂЛ а™∞аЂЗ а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂА а™ҐаЂЗа™≤а™°аЂА а™§а™®аЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ а™Ѓа™®а™Ња™µаЂЗ а™ЃаЂЛа™∞а™≤аЂЛ
F: а™єаЂЗ а™≤аЂЛа™Х а™ЃаЂБа™ЦаЂЗ а™•а™Ња™ѓ а™µа™Ња™§аЂЛ а™Ъа™Ѓ а™Ха™∞аЂБа™В а™µа™ња™ґаЂНа™µа™Ња™Є а™∞аЂЗ  
M: а™єаЂЗ а™ЧаЂЛа™Ѓа™®а™Њ а™ЃаЂЛа™ҐаЂЗ а™§аЂЛ а™Ча™Иа™£аЂБа™В а™®а™Њ а™ђа™Ва™Іа™Ња™ѓ а™∞аЂЗ

M: а™єаЂЗ а™Ца™Ња™Йа™В а™§а™Ња™∞а™Њ а™ЄаЂЛа™Ча™Ва™І а™§аЂЛа™ѓ а™Ъа™Ѓ а™®а™•аЂА а™ЃаЂЛа™®а™§аЂА 
     а™Ѓа™® а™Ѓа™Ња™Ва™•аЂА а™µаЂЗа™Ѓ а™§аЂБа™В а™єа™ЬаЂБ а™®а™•аЂА а™Ха™Ња™Ґа™§аЂА 
F: а™™аЂНа™∞аЂЗа™Ѓ а™®аЂА а™Ѓа™Ьа™Њ а™≤аЂЗа™µа™Њ а™Ѓа™Ьа™Ња™Х а™єаЂБа™§аЂЛ а™Ха™∞а™§аЂА
    а™єаЂЛ а™єа™¶ а™•аЂА а™µа™Іа™Ња™∞аЂЗ а™µа™ња™ґаЂНа™µа™Ња™Є а™§а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂЛ а™Ха™∞а™§аЂА
M: а™єаЂЗ а™™аЂНа™∞аЂЗа™Ѓ а™Ѓа™Ња™В а™™а™°аЂА а™Ьа™Ња™ѓ а™ЬаЂЗа™®аЂЗ а™µаЂЗа™Ѓ а™ЬаЂАа™µа™® а™ЂаЂЗа™≤ 
      а™∞аЂЗа™∞аЂЗ а™Ѓа™®а™Ња™µаЂЗ а™ЃаЂЛа™∞а™≤аЂЛ а™∞аЂЗ а™Ѓа™Ња™∞аЂА а™ҐаЂЗа™≤а™°аЂА а™§а™®аЂЗ а™∞аЂЗ а™Ѓа™®а™Ња™µаЂЗ а™ЃаЂЛа™∞а™≤аЂЛ

snippet.title: Champ (Official Video) Vikram Sarkar | Thought | VYRL Haryanvi | Haryanvi Song 2026 | Deepesh Goyal
snippet.description:
Presenting вАЬChampвАЭ by Vikram Sarkar вАУ an upbeat Haryanvi track celebrating hustle, confidence, and the journey of becoming self-made.

#Champ #VikramSarkar #HaryanviMusic 

Audio Credits:

Singer, Lyrics & Composer:  Vikram Sarkar
Music Produced & Mixed by: Thought
Audio Mastering Engineer: Connor Salmural
Recording Engineer and Music Assisted by: VVish

Video Credits:

Director - Deepesh Goyal
DOP - Vikcee
Asst. Directors - Ashish Khomera, Raja, Khyati Sharma
Editor/DI - Bharat Mittal/Deepesh Goyal
Hair & Makeup - Sanju
Design - Vikzee

Lyrics:

Khande na maal je pure na hove 
Kariye na call je crore na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove 
Krke dikhaya sala shor na hove 
Nu te hoya na chadi lor na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove 

Vip le re se number koe jaali naa
Krya na kaam jipe baji ho tali na 
Khud se bnaya seen kille koi 40 na 
Kam krya se mne raat kri kali na 
Maya bhteri aawe jati smbhali naa 
Busy Schedule bby  baitha m thaali naa 
Yaar ne tere bby Parwah koi sali naa 
Nute bharete par Baat mhare aali naaa 

Itna kamau sala jod na hove 
Pisa white ka sara Re froud na hove 
Bnya na todya jo record na hove 
Chora heer ka yo kise pe afford na hove 

Khande na maal je pure na hove 
Kariye na call je crore na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove 

Down to earth chora pal rhya se rete me 
2 number aale kaam krta na bete me 
Paake star the jo balak kai chete me 
Doori bnaio kite aajo lapete me 
Top pe betha chora aate re tower naa 
Chaat pe pool bby lete re shower naa
Dunia hiladyange puch mhari power naa 
Jiki tu fan bby mhare barabar naa 

Din dekhe se made re morod na hove 
Ude na bole jit lod na hove 
Paade se chaale par chod na hove 
Gaadi ude bhjau jit rode na hove 

Khande na maal je pure na hove 
Kariye na call je crore na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove 
Krke dikhaya sala shor na hove 
Nuyte hoya na chdi lor na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove

Music release inquiries: contact.vyrlregional@umusic.com

Follow & Subscribe to VYRL Haryanvi:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vyrlharyanvi/  
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/vyrlharyanvi/  
Sharechat: https://sharechat.com/profile/vyrlharyanvi?d=n  
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCViPmftRQIxoaVmlAfPTgdQ  


¬©Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
рЭРУрЭР°рЭРҐрЭРђ рЭРѓрЭРҐрЭРЭрЭРЮрЭР® рЭРђрЭР©рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭРҐрЭРЯрЭРҐрЭРЬрЭРЪрЭР•рЭР•рЭР≤, рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРҐрЭРђ рЭРШрЭР®рЭРЃрЭР≠рЭРЃрЭРЫрЭРЮ рЭРЬрЭР°рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРІрЭРЮрЭР• рЭРҐрЭРІ рЭР†рЭРЮрЭРІрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЪрЭР•, рЭР¶рЭРЪрЭР≤ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭРІрЭР≠рЭРЪрЭРҐрЭРІ рЭРЬрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭР≠рЭРЪрЭРҐрЭРІ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭР©рЭР≤рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР†рЭР°рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭР∞рЭР®рЭРЂрЭР§рЭРђ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЪрЭР≠ рЭР∞рЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭРІрЭР®рЭР≠ рЭРђрЭР©рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭРҐрЭРЯрЭРҐрЭРЬрЭРЪрЭР•рЭР•рЭР≤ рЭРЪрЭРЃрЭР≠рЭР°рЭР®рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР≥рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР® рЭРЫрЭРЮ рЭРЃрЭРђрЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЫрЭР≤ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭР©рЭР≤рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР†рЭР°рЭР≠ рЭР°рЭР®рЭР•рЭРЭрЭРЮрЭРЂ(рЭРђ), рЭРЫрЭРЃрЭР≠ рЭР∞рЭР°рЭРҐрЭРЬрЭР° рЭР∞рЭРЮ рЭРЫрЭРЮрЭР•рЭРҐрЭРЮрЭРѓрЭРЮ рЭРҐрЭРІ рЭР†рЭР®рЭР®рЭРЭ рЭРЯрЭРЪрЭРҐрЭР≠рЭР° рЭРЪрЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭР©рЭРЂрЭР®рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЫрЭР≤ рЭРЯрЭРЮрЭРЭрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЪрЭР• рЭР•рЭРЪрЭР∞ рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЕрЭРАрЭРИрЭРС рЭРФрЭРТрЭРД рЭРЭрЭР®рЭРЬрЭР≠рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭРІрЭРЮ рЭРЯрЭР®рЭРЂ рЭР®рЭРІрЭРЮ рЭР®рЭРЂ рЭР¶рЭР®рЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭР®рЭРЯ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЂрЭРЮрЭРЪрЭРђрЭР®рЭРІрЭРђ рЭРІрЭР®рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЪрЭРЫрЭР®рЭРѓрЭРЮ.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

рЭЩљрЭЪШрЭЪЭ рЭЪ†рЭЪТрЭЪЭрЭЪС рЭЪЬрЭЪЭрЭЪКрЭЪЧрЭЪНрЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪР рЭЪЭрЭЪСрЭЪО рЭЪЩрЭЪЫрЭЪШрЭЪЯрЭЪТрЭЪЬрЭЪТрЭЪШрЭЪЧрЭЪЬ рЭЪШрЭЪП рЭЪЬрЭЪОрЭЪМрЭЪЭрЭЪТрЭЪШрЭЪЧ рЭЯЈрЭЯґрЭЯЉ рЭЪКрЭЪЧрЭЪН рЭЯЈрЭЯґрЭЯЉрЭЩ∞, рЭЪЭрЭЪСрЭЪО рЭЩµрЭЩ∞рЭЩЄрЭЪБ рЭЪДрЭЪВрЭЩі рЭЪШрЭЪП рЭЪК рЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЩрЭЪҐрЭЪЫрЭЪТрЭЪРрЭЪСрЭЪЭрЭЪОрЭЪН рЭЪ†рЭЪШрЭЪЫрЭЪФ, рЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪМрЭЪХрЭЪЮрЭЪНрЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪР рЭЪЬрЭЪЮрЭЪМрЭЪС рЭЪЮрЭЪЬрЭЪО рЭЪЛрЭЪҐ рЭЪЫрЭЪОрЭЪЩрЭЪЫрЭЪШрЭЪНрЭЪЮрЭЪМрЭЪЭрЭЪТрЭЪШрЭЪЧ рЭЪТрЭЪЧ рЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЩрЭЪТрЭЪОрЭЪЬ рЭЪШрЭЪЫ рЭЪЫрЭЪОрЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЫрЭЪНрЭЪЬ рЭЪШрЭЪЫ рЭЪЛрЭЪҐ рЭЪКрЭЪЧрЭЪҐ рЭЪШрЭЪЭрЭЪСрЭЪОрЭЪЫ рЭЪЦрЭЪОрЭЪКрЭЪЧрЭЪЬ рЭЪЬрЭЪЩрЭЪОрЭЪМрЭЪТрЭЪПрЭЪТрЭЪОрЭЪН рЭЪЛрЭЪҐ рЭЪЭрЭЪСрЭЪКрЭЪЭ рЭЪЬрЭЪОрЭЪМрЭЪЭрЭЪТрЭЪШрЭЪЧ, рЭЪПрЭЪШрЭЪЫ рЭЪЩрЭЪЮрЭЪЫрЭЪЩрЭЪШрЭЪЬрЭЪОрЭЪЬ рЭЪЬрЭЪЮрЭЪМрЭЪС рЭЪКрЭЪЬ рЭЪЫрЭЪОрЭЪЯрЭЪТрЭЪОрЭЪ†, рЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЦрЭЪЦрЭЪОрЭЪЧрЭЪЭ рЭЪТрЭЪЬ рЭЪЧрЭЪШрЭЪЭ рЭЪКрЭЪЧ рЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪПрЭЪЫрЭЪТрЭЪЧрЭЪРрЭЪОрЭЪЦрЭЪОрЭЪЧрЭЪЭ рЭЪШрЭЪП рЭЪМрЭЪШрЭЪЩрЭЪҐрЭЪЫрЭЪТрЭЪРрЭЪСрЭЪЭ.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
рЭРУрЭР°рЭРҐрЭРђ рЭРѓрЭРҐрЭРЭрЭРЮрЭР® рЭРђрЭР©рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭРҐрЭРЯрЭРҐрЭРЬрЭРЪрЭР•рЭР•рЭР≤, рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРҐрЭРђ рЭРШрЭР®рЭРЃрЭР≠рЭРЃрЭРЫрЭРЮ рЭРЬрЭР°рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРІрЭРЮрЭР• рЭРҐрЭРІ рЭР†рЭРЮрЭРІрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЪрЭР•, рЭР¶рЭРЪрЭР≤ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭРІрЭР≠рЭРЪрЭРҐрЭРІ рЭРЬрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭР≠рЭРЪрЭРҐрЭРІ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭР©рЭР≤рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР†рЭР°рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭР∞рЭР®рЭРЂрЭР§рЭРђ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЪрЭР≠ рЭР∞рЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭРІрЭР®рЭР≠ рЭРђрЭР©рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭРҐрЭРЯрЭРҐрЭРЬрЭРЪрЭР•рЭР•рЭР≤ рЭРЪрЭРЃрЭР≠рЭР°рЭР®рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР≥рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР® рЭРЫрЭРЮ рЭРЃрЭРђрЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЫрЭР≤ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЬрЭР®рЭР©рЭР≤рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭР†рЭР°рЭР≠ рЭР°рЭР®рЭР•рЭРЭрЭРЮрЭРЂ(рЭРђ), рЭРЫрЭРЃрЭР≠ рЭР∞рЭР°рЭРҐрЭРЬрЭР° рЭР∞рЭРЮ рЭРЫрЭРЮрЭР•рЭРҐрЭРЮрЭРѓрЭРЮ рЭРҐрЭРІ рЭР†рЭР®рЭР®рЭРЭ рЭРЯрЭРЪрЭРҐрЭР≠рЭР° рЭРЪрЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭР©рЭРЂрЭР®рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЬрЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЫрЭР≤ рЭРЯрЭРЮрЭРЭрЭРЮрЭРЂрЭРЪрЭР• рЭР•рЭРЪрЭР∞ рЭРЪрЭРІрЭРЭ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЕрЭРАрЭРИрЭРС рЭРФрЭРТрЭРД рЭРЭрЭР®рЭРЬрЭР≠рЭРЂрЭРҐрЭРІрЭРЮ рЭРЯрЭР®рЭРЂ рЭР®рЭРІрЭРЮ рЭР®рЭРЂ рЭР¶рЭР®рЭРЂрЭРЮ рЭР®рЭРЯ рЭР≠рЭР°рЭРЮ рЭРЂрЭРЮрЭРЪрЭРђрЭР®рЭРІрЭРђ рЭРІрЭР®рЭР≠рЭРЮрЭРЭ рЭРЪрЭРЫрЭР®рЭРѓрЭРЮ.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I canвАЩt believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide рЯЪА https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store
Join our discord server for your chance to compete in future Minecraft challenges!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming

Music Provided by https://www.extrememusic.com
----------------------------------------------------------------
follow all of these or i will kick you
вАҐ Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/MrBeast/
вАҐ Twitter - https://twitter.com/MrBeast
вАҐ  Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/mrbeast
--------------------------------------------------------------------

en.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
en.description:
I canвАЩt believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide рЯЪА https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

ађґађХа≠Нађ§ађњађЄа≠На≠±ађ∞а≠Вађ™ађњађ£а≠А ађЃађЊвАЩ ађЃађЩа≠НађЧађ≥ађЊ ађПађђађВ ађЃађЊвАЩ ађєађ∞ађЪађ£а≠Нађ°а≠АађЩа≠НађХ ађЕађ™ађЊађ∞ ађХађ∞а≠Бађ£ађЊ ађУ ађЃађєађњађЃађЊађХа≠Б ађ®а≠ЗађЗ ађЄађЬађЊађѓађЊађЗађ•ађњађђађЊ ађПађєађњ ађґађХа≠Нађ§ађњађґађЊађ≥а≠А ађђађ®а≠Нађ¶ађ®ађЊ "ађЬа≠Я ађ§а≠Б ађЃађЩа≠НађЧађ≥ађЊ ађЃађЊ ађЧа≠Л ађЬа≠Я ађєађ∞ађЪађ£а≠Нађ°а≠А" ађ™а≠Нађ∞ађ§ађњађЯађњ ађ≠ађХа≠Нађ§ађ∞ ађ™а≠Нађ∞ађЊађ£ађ∞а≠З ађПађХ ађ¶ађњађђа≠На≠Я ађґађХа≠Нађ§ађњ ађ≠ађ∞ађњађ¶а≠Зађђа•§ ађѓа≠Зађ§а≠Зађђа≠Зађ≥а≠З ађ®ађЃађњађ§ађЊ ађЕађЧа≠Нађ∞а≠±ађЊађ≤ађЩа≠НађХ ађЄа≠Зађєађњ ађЧађЃа≠Нађ≠а≠Аађ∞ ађПађђађВ ађґа≠Нађ∞ађ¶а≠НађІађЊађ≠ађ∞ађЊ ађХађ£а≠Нађ†ађ∞а≠З ађЃађЊвАЩађЩа≠НађХ ађЬа≠ЯађЧађЊађ® ађґа≠Бађ≠а≠З, ађЄа≠Зађ§а≠Зађђа≠Зађ≥а≠З ађ≤ађЊађЧа≠З ађЄађ§а≠З ађѓа≠ЗађЃађњађ§ађњ ађЃађЊвАЩ ађ®ађњађЬа≠З ађЄађ®а≠Нађ§ађЊађ®ађ∞ ађЧа≠БађєађЊађ∞ађњ ађґа≠Бађ£ађњађђађЊађХа≠Б ађУађєа≠Нађ≤ађЊађЗ ађЖађЄађњађЫађ®а≠Нађ§ађња•§

snippet.title: рЯ§©рЯТ•Bechara Shinchan Ko Ghar Se Bhaga Diya рЯШҐ Phir Bana Sabka HeroрЯ§© indian thept aura semulatar рЯТ•
snippet.description:
Is video mein ek emotional aur adventure story hai. Shinchan ghar ka sara kaam karta hai, phir bhi uski mummy use daantti aur maarti rehti hai. Ek din to use khana bhi nahi diya jata aur ghar se bhaga diya jata hai.

Dusri taraf Nobita ki mummy Nobita se bahut pyar karti hai. Tabhi ek din Kamla chudail Nobita ki mummy ko utha kar le jaati hai. Nobita bahut rota hai aur Shinchan se madad maangta hai.

Phir Shinchan aur Nobita milkar ek dangerous mission par jaate hain aur milkar Nobita ki mummy ko chudail se bachate hain.

Kya Shinchan aur Nobita apni mummy ko bacha payenge?
Ye jaanne ke liye video ko end tak zaroor dekho.

Indian Theft Auto Simulator Story
#shinchan #nobita #indianTheftAuto #indiantheftautosimulator #cartoonstory #shinchanstory #nobitastory #cartoonanimation #hindicartoon #gamingstory #emotionalstory

ta.description:
аЃ§аЃЃаЃњаЃіаѓН аЃ§аЃњаЃ∞аѓИаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аЃЯаЃЃаЃЊаЃ© аЃЃаѓВаЃ©аѓНаЃµаЃЊаЃХаѓНаЃХаЃњаЃ≤аѓН аЃЗаЃ∞аѓБаЃ®аѓНаЃ§аѓБ аЃ§аѓБаЃЯаЃњаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аЃЊаЃ©, аЃЃаЃњаЃХаЃµаѓБаЃЃаѓН аЃОаЃ§аЃњаЃ∞аѓНаЃ™аЃЊаЃ∞аѓНаЃХаѓНаЃХаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аЃЯаѓНаЃЯ аЃЃаѓЖаЃХаѓНаЃХаЃ∞аѓАаЃ©аЃЊ аЃµаѓАаЃЯаЃњаЃѓаѓЛ аЃ™аЃЊаЃЯаЃ≤аѓН. аЃ™аЃњаЃ∞аЃ™аѓБаЃ§аѓЗаЃµаЃЊаЃµаЃњаЃ©аѓН аЃЕаЃ§аЃњаЃµаѓЗаЃХ аЃµаѓЗаЃХ аЃ®аЃЯаЃ©аЃЃаѓН аЃ§аЃµаЃ±аЃµаЃњаЃЯаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓВаЃЯаЃЊаЃ§аѓБ. аЃП аЃЖаЃ∞аѓН аЃ∞аЃєаѓНаЃЃаЃЊаЃ©аЃњаЃ©аѓН аЃТаЃ∞аѓБ аЃ™аЃЊаЃЯаЃ≤аЃњаЃ©аѓН аЃ™аѓЗаЃЩаѓНаЃХаЃ∞аѓН. аЃЙаЃ£аѓНаЃЃаѓИаЃѓаЃњаЃ≤аѓЗаЃѓаѓЗ аЃЕаЃ±аѓНаЃ™аѓБаЃ§аЃЃаЃЊаЃ© аЃ®аЃЯаЃ©аЃЃаѓН аЃЃаЃ±аѓНаЃ±аѓБаЃЃаѓН аЃЗаЃЪаѓИ аЃµаЃњаЃ∞аѓБаЃ®аѓНаЃ§аѓБ. 

аЃ§аЃњаЃ∞аѓИаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аЃЯаЃЃаѓН: аЃЃаѓВаЃ©аѓНаЃµаЃЊаЃХаѓН
аЃ™аЃЊаЃЯаЃ≤аѓН: аЃЃаѓЖаЃХаѓНаЃХаЃ∞аѓАаЃ©аЃЊ
аЃЗаЃЪаѓИ & аЃ™аЃЊаЃЯаЃХаЃ∞аѓН: аЃП аЃЖаЃ∞аѓН аЃ∞аЃєаѓНаЃЃаЃЊаЃ©аѓН
аЃ®аЃЯаЃњаЃ§аѓНаЃ§аЃµаЃ∞аѓН: аЃ™аЃњаЃ∞аЃ™аѓБаЃ§аѓЗаЃµаЃЊ
аЃЗаЃѓаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓБаЃ©аЃ∞аѓН: аЃЃаЃ©аѓЛаЃЬаѓН аЃОаЃ©аѓН аЃОаЃЄаѓН

id.description:
Video musik Macarena yang meriah dan sangat dinantikan dari film Tamil Moonwalk. Tarian cepat dan energik oleh Prabhudeva yang tidak boleh dilewatkan. Lagu yang luar biasa dari A R Rahman. Sebuah sajian tari dan musik yang benar-benar spektakuler.

а∞®а∞Яа∞ња∞Ва∞Ъа∞ња∞®а∞¶а∞њ: а∞™а±На∞∞а∞≠а±Ба∞¶а±За∞µа∞Њ

ar.description:
Ў£ЎЇўЖўКЎ© "ўЕЎІўГЎІЎ±ўКўЖЎІ" ЎІўДўЕЎµўИЎ±Ў©ЎМ ЎІўДўЕўЖЎ™ЎЄЎ±Ў© Ў®ЎіўИўВЎМ ўЕўЖ ўБўКўДўЕ "ўЕўИўЖ ўИўИўГ" ЎІўДЎ™ЎІўЕўКўДўК. Ў±ўВЎµЎ© Ў®Ў±ЎІЎ®ўЗўИЎѓўКўБЎІ ЎІўДЎ≥Ў±ўКЎєЎ© ўИЎІўДЎ≠ўЕЎІЎ≥ўКЎ© ўДЎІ Ў™ўПўБўИўСЎ™. Ў£ЎЇўЖўКЎ© Ў±ЎІЎ¶ЎєЎ© ўЕўЖ Ў™Ў£ўДўКўБ Ў•ўКўЗ ЎҐЎ± Ў±Ў≠ўЕЎІўЖ. ўЕЎ™ЎєЎ© ўЕўИЎ≥ўКўВўКЎ© ўИЎ±ЎІўВЎµЎ© ўДЎІ Ў™ўПЎґЎІўЗўЙ.

ЎІЎєЎ™ўЕЎІЎѓЎІЎ™ ЎІўДўБўКўДўЕ:

ЎІўДўЕўЕЎЂўДўИўЖ: Ў®Ў±ЎІЎ®ўЗўИЎѓўКўБЎІЎМ ўКўИЎЇўК Ў®ЎІЎ®ўИЎМ ЎҐЎђўИ ўБЎІЎ±ЎЇўКЎ≤ЎМ Ў£Ў±ЎђўИўЖ Ў£ЎіўИўГЎІўЖЎМ Ў≥ЎІЎ™Ў≤ЎМ ўЖўКЎіўЕЎІ Ў™ЎіўКўЖЎЇЎІЎ®ЎІЎМ Ў≥ўИЎіўЕўКЎЂЎІ ўЖЎІўКЎІўГЎМ ўЕўИЎ™ЎІўК Ў±ЎІЎђўКўЖЎѓЎ±ЎІўЖЎМ ўДўИўДўИ Ў≥ЎІЎ®ўЗЎІ Ў≥ўИЎІўЕўКўЖЎІЎЂЎІўЖЎМ Ў±ўКЎѓўКўЖ ўГўКўЖЎђЎ≥ўДўКЎМ ЎѓўКЎ®ЎІ ЎіЎІўЖўГЎІЎ±ЎМ ЎѓўГЎ™ўИЎ± Ў≥ЎІўЖЎЂўИЎі ЎђЎІўГўИЎ® ўИЎ±ЎІўЕўГўИўЕЎІЎ± ўЖЎІЎ™ЎІЎ±ЎІЎђЎІўЖ.
ЎІўДўЕЎЃЎ±Ўђ: ўЕЎІўЖўИЎђ ўЖўКЎ±ўЕЎІўДЎІ Ў≥Ў±ўКЎѓЎІЎ±ЎІўЖ
ЎІўДЎіЎєЎІЎ±: ЎЃўДўБ ўИўИЎѓЎ≤ ўДўДЎ•ўЖЎ™ЎІЎђ
ЎІўДўЕўЖЎ™ЎђўИўЖ: ўЕЎІўЖўИЎђ ўЖўКЎ±ўЕЎІўДЎІ Ў≥Ў±ўКЎѓўЗЎІЎ±ЎІўЖЎМ ЎѓўКўБўКЎІ ўЕЎІўЖўИЎђ ўИЎ®Ў±ЎІўБўКўЖ Ў•ўКўДЎІўГ

ЎІўДўБЎ±ўКўВ ЎІўДўДўИЎђЎ≥Ў™ўК: Ў≥Ў±ўКўДўИЎђЎІўЖЎІЎЂЎІўЖ Ў£ЎМ Ў™ЎіўКўДЎІЎ®ЎІўЖЎѓўКЎІўЖ Ў•Ў≥ЎМ ўБЎІЎ±ўИЎ≥ЎІўК ўЕЎ≠ўЕЎѓ Ў£ЎМ ўЖЎІЎђЎІЎ±ЎІЎђЎІўЖ Ў•Ў≥ЎМ ўЖўКўГўКўДЎЇ ЎђўК

snippet.title: Rijusaba | Hanan Shaah | Jubair Muhammed | Jasir Muhammad | Gallery Vision
snippet.description:
Rijusaba is a beautiful musical rendition sung by Hanan Shaah and Jasir Muhammad , bringing together soulful vocals and heartfelt melody. Music revisited by Jubair Muhammed , produced by Sharaf Gallery , and proudly presented by Gallery Vision.

Singers: Hanan Shaah, Jasir Muhammad
Music Revisited: Jubair Muhammed
Producer: Sharaf Gallery
Original Composer: Peer Muhammed
Lyrics: C H Vellikulangara
Guitar: Cee Vee
Percussions: Aromal Murali
Wood winds: Shyam Adat
Mixing & Mastering: Nikhil Madhav
Lyrical Video: Binoyka
Creative Contributions: Moidu Amar
Marketing & Promotions: Suhas
Creative Head: Fazeel Azeez
Label Manager: Jinu A J
Special Thanks: C H Vellikulangara & Peer Muhammed Family
